---
title: "Boqian Mao"
toc: false
about:
  template: jolla
  image: "Profile.JPG"
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/boqian-dot
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/boqian8344b93bb/
---

boqian@umich.edu | +1 626-489-6124

## About Me

Hi, I’m Boqian Mao, a graduate student in the Department of Biostatistics at the University of Michigan. I’m passionate about applying statistical techniques to real-world problems and exploring the power of machine learning in finance, health care, and other related fields.
